zh.lifeSummary: 當Iorwerth Gam ab Owain於大約1170年出生在英國威爾斯可爾德時，他的父親Owain ap Bleddyn32歲，母親Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton31歲。他於大約1198年與Angharad ferch Gruffudd在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1236年享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

nameMeanings.name: Gam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Iorwerth Gam ab Owain was born about 1170, in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Owain ap Bleddyn, was 32 and his mother, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, was 31. He married Angharad ferch Gruffudd about 1198, in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1236, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iorwerth Gam ab Owain est né environ 1170, à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain ap Bleddyn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Angharad ferch Gruffudd environ 1198, à Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1236, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth Gam ab Owain è nato il circa 1170 nel Clwyd, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Owain ap Bleddyn, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Angharad ferch Gruffudd circa 1198, nel Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1236, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Gam ab Owainが約1170年にイギリスウェールズクルウイドで生まれた時，父Owain ap Bleddynは32歳，母Efa verch Madog Goch of Suttonは31歳であった。約1198年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンペングウエルンでAngharad ferch Gruffuddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1236年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Gam ab Owain(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain ap Bleddyn(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1198년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 펜그워에서 Angharad ferch Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1236년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iorwerth Gam ab Owain родился около 1170 г. в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Owain ap Bleddyn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Efa verch Madog Goch of Sutton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad ferch Gruffudd около 1198 г. в местности пэнгвирн, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1236 г. в возрасте 67 лет.
